/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/deadliner_repository_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/deadliner_repository_tests.dir/deadliner_repository_tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deadliner_repository_tests.dir/tests/test_repository.cpp.o -o deadliner_repository_tests  libdeadliner_core.a /usr/lib/libQt6Test.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
